title: Fact-check evidence record
description: One traceable verdict produced by the fact-check skill. A file may contain a single record or an array of records.

location.description: Where the claim appears (page, section, line).

type.description: Free-form claim category, e.g. financial_figure, percentage, date, event.

source_url.description: Must resolve and contain source_value when verdict is 'verified'.

factCheckRules.description: Cross-field rules enforced by validate_evidence.py beyond plain JSON Schema.
rules: A 'verified' verdict requires a non-null source_url.
A 'verified' verdict on a P0 or P1 claim requires source_tier of 'primary' or 'secondary' (never 'tertiary' alone).
An 'error' verdict requires both reported_value and source_value.
An 'unverifiable' verdict requires a non-empty notes field explaining what was searched.
